infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses your camera to capture photos for entries.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library to select photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddOnlyUsageDescription: This app needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to record where entries are created.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to record where entries are created.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location to record where entries are created.
